<robotNode content="{"headers":[],"params":[{"fieldName":"SERIES_CODE","dataType":"String","dataTypeText":"字符串","fieldValue":""},{"fieldName":"FONDS_CODE","dataType":"String","dataTypeText":"字符串","fieldValue":"DQ001"}],"formParams":[{"field":"$fdTemplate$.FdName","fieldText":"$模板名称$.FdName","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"OABDMC","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$docSubject$","fieldText":"$主题$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"TITLE_PROPER","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$时间.日期格式化$($docCreateTime$, \"yyyy-MM-dd，HH:mm:ss\") ","fieldText":"$时间.日期格式化$($创建时间$, \"yyyy-MM-dd，HH:mm:ss\") ","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"DATE_OF_CREATION","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$docCreator$.fdName","fieldText":"$申请人$.fdName","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"FILING_USER","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$docCreator$.fdNo","fieldText":"$申请人$.fdNo","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"CRID","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_appr_org$fdName","fieldText":"$申请单位 $fdName","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"SQDW","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_seal_reason$","fieldText":"$审批事由 $","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"SY","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_approver$.fdName","fieldText":"$F申请人$.fdName","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"SQR","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fdId$","fieldText":"$ID$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"OA_ID","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fdDepartment$.fdName","fieldText":"$部门$.fdName","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"FILING_DEPT","defaultValue":""},{"field":"$fd_39450a4209645e$","fieldText":"$用印公司类型$","dataType":"Object","fieldName":"YYLX","defaultValue":""}],"responseParams":[],"restfulUrl":"http://xapi.db.ad01.sec.com/apigateway/GXTTERMS/api/archive-mainpage/open-api/import-files?X-Sec-App-Auth-Key=78fd2d012463b58d3e880645a74015bd","htmlFinishTag":"","convert2pdfUrl":"","successParam":{"successFieldName":"status","successValue":"0"},"dataFieldName":"data"}" id="N70" name="机器人节点" unid="*@Robot@html2pdfRobotNode" x="400" y="2260"/>
<endNode id="N3" name="结束节点" x="400" y="2380"/>
